vulnerablePopulations: patients with limited access to imaging and neurology
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ICHD-3 hemiplegic migraine criteria; stroke/TIA must be excluded (often requires imaging)

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often treated as stroke in emergency settings; follow-up neurology access limited outside metros
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Individualized acute management; preventive therapy in specialist care
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to imaging and headache specialists and delayed follow-up
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Tertiary hospitals can provide imaging and neurology evaluation in urban centers
